metadata.description: Dynamic memory file to track plot progression, character states, and environmental context for the AI.

story_progress.immediate_goal: <e.g., Protagonist needs to pass the first academy test>

rolling_summaries.summary: <e.g., Fang Yuan successfully refined the Liquor worm using the Spring Autumn Cicada's aura. He completely broke ties with his brother Fang Zheng.>

active_plot_threads.title: <e.g., The Academy Assessment>
active_plot_threads.details: <e.g., The academy elder will test the students' primeval essence usage today.>

dynamic_character_states.physical_condition: <e.g., Exhausted from staying up all night>
dynamic_character_states.recent_actions: <e.g., Refined the Liquor worm, scolded Fang Zheng>

translation_flow_buffer: <e.g., Previous 3 translated paragraphs in Myanmar for immediate continuity>
